zh.lifeSummary: 當Walter de Bolebec - Earl of Buckingham於1140年出生在英國諾圖波藍德史易福德時，他的父親Walter Bolebec26歲，母親Helawise Bolbec22歲。他於大約1161年與Sibil de Vesci結婚。他們至少是3個兒子和2個女兒的父母。他去世於1190年在英國英格蘭諾圖波藍德白維爾享年50歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Walter de Bolebec - Earl of Buckingham于1140年出生在英国諾圖波藍德史易福德时，他的父亲Walter Bolebec26岁，母亲Helawise Bolbec22岁。他于大约1161年与Sibil de Vesci结婚。他们至少是3个儿子和2个女儿的父母。他去世于1190年在英国英格兰諾圖波藍德白維爾享年50岁。

nameMeanings.name: Earl
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: nickname from Middle English e(o)rl ‘earl’, a traditional English title of nobility equivalent in rank to French and Norman Count .

variants.name: Earle
meanings: English: variant of   Earl  .

variants.name: Harle
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  German Dieter, Johann, Kurt.
South German (Härle): nickname from a diminutive of Middle High German hār ‘hair’.

English (northern) and Scottish: habitational name from Kirkharle and Little Harle in Northumberland (earlier simply Herle, Harle), possibly named from an Old English personal name Herela (a derivative of various compound names with the first element here ‘army’) + Old English lēah ‘wood, clearing’.

variants.name: Earls
meanings: English: variant of Earl with genitival -s, denoting someone who was a member of an earl's household, or, with post-medieval excrescent -s. In Ireland, when this is not the English name, it is from Gaelic Mac an Iarla ‘son of the earl’.

variants.name: Hearl
meanings: English: variant of Earl with prosthetic H-.

variants.name: Count
meanings: English: nickname from Anglo-Norman French counte ‘count’ (Old French conte, from Latin comes, comitem); a title of French and Norman nobility, ranking as equivalent to English Earl .

variants.name: Earll
meanings: English (Kent): variant of   Earl  .

nameMeanings.name: of
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Chinese: Cheng, Jing, Kam Fung, Wai Shing, Wing, Yali, Yuk.
Chinese:
variant Romanization of the surnames 歐 and 區, see   Ou   1 and 2.

variants.name: Ou
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Chinese Wei, Ying, Ching, Heng, Hong, Jia, Kuang Yu, Li-Ching, Cho, Chong, Chung, Sa.  Southeast Asian Lichun, Ming, Quan, Roeun, Sokhom, Chau, Hai, Leang, Ly, Nhanh, Phan, Pho, Tha.

Chinese: Mandarin form of the surname 歐, meaning ‘to sing someone's praise’ in ancient Chinese: (i) from the placename Dong Ou (東甌), a fief (in present-day Wenzhou in Zhejiang province) which was granted to Yao in 192  BC . It is said that Yao was a descendant of Wujiang (reigned 355–333  BC ), king of the state of Yue (located mainly in present-day Zhejiang and Jiangxi provinces) during the Spring and Autumn period (770–476  BC ). (ii) from the placename Ou Yu (歐餘), the name of a fief (located in present-day Zhejiang province) that was granted to Ti, the second son of Wujiang (reigned 355–333  BC ), king of the state of Yue (located mainly in present-day Zhejiang and Jiangxi provinces) during the Spring and Autumn period (770–476  BC ).

Chinese: Mandarin form of the surname 區, originally denoting an ancient vessel for measurement in ancient Chinese: from the personal name of Ou Zhizi (歐治子), an expert sword-maker who lived during the Spring and Autumn period (770–476 BC ). Some of his descendants inherited Ou (歐) as their surname, simplifying the Chinese character 歐 to 區.

nameMeanings.name: Buckingham
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: habitational name from the former county seat of the county of Buckinghamshire, Old English Buccingahamm ‘water meadow (Old English hamm) of the people of (-inga-) Bucc(a)’.

nameMeanings.name: Walter
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: From an Old French personal name of Germanic (Frankish) origin, derived from wald ‘rule’ + heri, hari ‘army’. This was adopted by the Normans and introduced by them to England, superseding the native Old English form, Wealdhere. It was a very popular name in medieval England, normally pronounced ‘Water’.

variants.name: Walther
meanings: from wald ‘rule’ + heri ‘army’; name of the famous medieval minnesinger Walther von der Vogelweide ( c.1170– c.1230 ).

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Short form of the various boys' names with the first syllable Ed-, especially Edward .

variants.name: Edward
meanings: From an Old English personal name derived from ēad ‘prosperity, riches’ + weard ‘guard’. This has been one of the most successful of all Old English names, in frequent use from before the Conquest to the present day, and even being exported into other European languages. It was the name of three Anglo-Saxon kings and has been borne by eight kings of England since the Norman Conquest. It is also the name of the youngest son of Queen Elizabeth II . The most influential early bearer was King Edward the Confessor ( ?1002–66 ; ruled 1042–66 ). In a troubled period of English history, he contrived to rule fairly and (for a time at any rate) firmly. But in the latter part of his reign he paid more attention to his religion than to his kingdom. He died childless, and his death sparked off conflicting claims to his throne, which were resolved by the victory of William the Conqueror at the Battle of Hastings. His memory was honoured by Normans and English alike, for his fairness and his piety. Edward's mother was Norman; he had spent part of his youth in Normandy; and William claimed to have been nominated by Edward as his successor. Edward was canonized in the 12th century, and came to be venerated throughout Europe as a model of a Christian king.

en.lifeSummary: When Walter de Bolebec - Earl of Buckingham was born in 1140, in Styford, Northumberland, England, his father, Walter Bolebec, was 26 and his mother, Helawise Bolbec, was 22. He married Sibil de Vesci about 1161. They were the parents of at least 3 sons and 2 daughters. He died in 1190, in Bywell, Northumberland, England, United Kingdom, at the age of 50.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Walter de Bolebec - Earl of Buckingham est né en 1140, à Styford, Northumberland, Angleterre, son père, Walter Bolebec, avait 26 ans et sa mère, Helawise Bolbec, avait 22 ans. Il a épousé Sibil de Vesci environ 1161. Ils ont eu au moins 3 fils et 2 filles. Il est décédé en 1190, à Bywell, Northumberland, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 50 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Walter de Bolebec - Earl of Buckingham 1140 in Styford, Northumberland, England geboren wurde, war sein Vater Walter Bolebec 26 und seine Mutter Helawise Bolbec 22. Er hat um 1161 Sibil de Vesci geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 3 Söhne und 2 Töchter. Er starb 1190 im Alter von 50 Jahren in Bywell, Northumberland, England, United Kingdom.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Walter de Bolebec - Earl of Buckingham è nato il nel 1140 nel Styford, Northumberland, England, il suo padre, Walter Bolebec, aveva 26 anni e il suo madre, Helawise Bolbec, aveva 22 anni. Lui sposato Sibil de Vesci circa 1161. Erano genitori di almeno 3 figli e 2 figlie. Morì nel 1190, nel Bywell, Northumberland, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, all'età di 50 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Walter de Bolebec - Earl of Buckinghamが1140年にイギリスノースウンバーランドストイフォードで生まれた時，父Walter Bolebecは26歳，母Helawise Bolbecは22歳であった。約1161年にSibil de Vesciと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも3人の息子と2人の娘の親であった。彼は1190年にイギリスイギリスノースウンバーランドブイウエルで50歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Walter de Bolebec - Earl of Buckingham(이)가 1140년 영국 노르스벌랜드 스티퍼드에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Walter Bolebec(은)는 26세였고, 그의 어머니 Helawise Bolbec(은)는 22세였다. 그는 대략 1161년 Sibil de Vesci(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 세 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1190년 영국 잉글랜드 노르스벌랜드 비웰에서 50세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Walter de Bolebec - Earl of Buckingham nasceu em 1140, em Styford, Northumberland, Inglaterra, seu pai, Walter Bolebec, tinha 26 anos e sua mãe, Helawise Bolbec, tinha 22 anos. Ele casou-se com Sibil de Vesci aproximadamente 1161. Eles tiveram pelo menos 3 filhos e 2 filhas. Ele faleceu em 1190, em Bywell, Northumberland, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, com 50 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Walter de Bolebec - Earl of Buckingham родился в 1140 г. в местности стифорд, нортумбирланд, Англия, его отцу по имени Walter Bolebec было 26 лет, а матери, которую звали Helawise Bolbec, 22. Он женился на женщине по имени Sibil de Vesci около 1161 г. У них было по крайней мере 3 сына и 2 дочери. Он умер в 1190 г. в местности бивелл, нортумбирланд, Англия, Великобритания в возрасте 50 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Walter de Bolebec - Earl of Buckingham nació en 1140, en Styford, Northumberland, Inglaterra, su papá, Walter Bolebec, tenía 26 años y su mamá, Helawise Bolbec, tenía 22 años. Se casó con Sibil de Vesci aproximadamente 1161. Fueron padres de por lo menos 3 hijos y 2 hijas. Murió en 1190, en Bywell, Northumberland, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, a la edad de 50 años.
